{{CargoRelic
|name=Sid Meier's Snivilization
|class_id=20986
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Guide your species from mud huts to cosmic tyranny! Research "Wheel 2.0", debate "To War or Not to War", and accidentally nuke your allies—all before breakfast. Banned by Earth's Will.[Beter's Note]"One...more...OH SNAIL, time to go to work"
|fame=30
|art=18
|fth=14
|civ=15
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per 10k Relic Points, Snail ATK +2<br>Relic Points: 200000/200000
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per 10k Relic Points, Snail ATK +4<br>Relic Points: 200000/200000
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per 10k Relic Points, Snail ATK +6<br>Relic Points: 200000/200000
|ss4=Snail HP +300<br>Per 10k Relic Points, Snail ATK +6<br>Relic Points: 200000/200000
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br>Per 10k Relic Points, Snail ATK +6<br>Relic Points: 200000/200000<br> (Awakened)
}}
